name: The Momentum
effect: Replace the plan with forward motion. This card is considered strategic.

clauses.name: VELOCITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If no plan exists: Momentum is substituted and considered equivalent.

clauses.name: FRICTION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When a stakeholder requests a roadmap: Redirect attention to recent activity.

clauses.name: DESTINATION EFFECT
clauses.rule: At the point of arrival: Wherever you stopped is considered where you were going.

witness_quote: We'll figure it out as we go.
